# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

job: deploy
stage: deploy
script:
- scp -r bin/* root@172.16.58.3:/usr/local/nginx/html/static
only:
- master
- prod
artifacts:
paths:
- bin/
expire_in: 30d

</project><pr_file>/app/src/main/java/com/example/kotlinbasics/MainActivity.kt<pr_base_code>package com.example.kotlinbasics


import android.os.Bundle
import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
// import android.view.*
// import android.widget.*
import kotlinx.android.synthetic.main.activity_main.*

class MainActivity : AppCompatActivity() {
    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)

        setContentView(R.layout.activity_main)


        val btn = button
        btn?.setOnClickListener{
            var text = editText.text;

            if (text == null || text!!.isEmpty()) {
                text = "empty";
            } else {
                text = text + " is good.";<pr_diff><pr_file>/.idea/gradle.xml<pr_diff_hunk>@@ -1,8 +1,9 @@
